title: Will a wild animal be infected with the New World screwworm in the contiguous US, before 2027?
Will Pope Leo XIV visit another country other than Spain before September 2026?
Will Spain hold a general election before May 23, 2027?
Will the UK Parliament approve the target to cut greenhouse gas emissions by 87 per cent by 2040?
Will the U.S. enact an AI safety federal statute or executive order in 2026?
Will the Federal Reserve raise the federal funds target range before July 30, 2026?
Will the U.S. employment-population ratio for ages 25-54 fall below 70% by 2035?
Will the annual revenue run rate of the top two AI labs in 2030 exceed $1T (2026 USD)?
Will there be a documented case of civil unrest (e.g., a strike or protest) with over 1,000,000 participants globally, citing AI impacts (e.g., labor displacement) as a primary grievance by 2030?
Will the average monthly price per kWh of electricity in the U.S. break $0.40 before the end of 2030 (doubling recent values)?
Will annualized U.S. per-capita consumption growth from 2030-2035 exceed 8% (with appropriate adjustments for quality changes, home production, and zero-cost goods and services)?
Will any official weather station in India record air temperatures of at least 55.0°C (131.0°F) for three or more consecutive days before January 1, 2050?
Will Swiss voters approve the "No to a Switzerland with 10 million" population cap referendum?
Will Starlink's website show India as a country with Starlink availability before September 1, 2026?
Will the June 2026 University of Michigan Consumer Sentiment number be greater than it was for May 2026?
Will US federal agencies cease international arrival processing at any of the following airports for 3 or more consecutive days before 2027?
Will Starlink's website show South Africa as a country with Starlink availability before September 1, 2026?
Will Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin speak on the phone with each other before August 1, 2026?
Will an AI shopping agent service achieve significant commercial deployment by December 31, 2026?
Will the People's Republic of China blockade or quarantine Taiwan before September 1, 2026?
Will a hurricane make landfall in the continental United States before September 1, 2026?
Will any U.S. state or EU member state restrict large-scale data center grid connections before September 2026?
Will any match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup be delayed by more than 30 minutes due to extreme heat?
Will any host nation (USA, Mexico or Canada) reach the semifinals of the 2026 World Cup?
Will the Community beat Dylan Matthews in the Metaculus Cup Summer 2026?
Will Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Vladimir Putin meet in person before September 1, 2026?
Will the U.S. Senate pass an Iran war powers resolution before August 1, 2026?
Will OpenAI's ChatGPT Atlas browser be released for Windows before September 1, 2026?
Will OpenAI publicly file an initial registration statement (S-1) with the SEC to launch an IPO, before September 1, 2026?
Will PayPal’s proposed bank receive FDIC approval before July 1, 2027?
